ast.name: alert
ast.source: Simple TEX not working properly, see logs.
ast.target: Simple TEX 无法正常工作，请查看日志。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: No image found in clipboard, please copy an image then run command again.
ast.target: 剪贴板中未找到图片，请复制一张图片后再运行命令。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: No markdown view found, please open a markdown file.
ast.target: 未找到 Markdown 视图，请打开一个 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Error while fetching latex, please check the console for more information.
ast.target: 获取 LaTeX 时出错，请查看控制台获取更多信息。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Simpletext response
ast.target: Simpletext 响应

ast.name: log
ast.source: Simple tex response
ast.target: Simple tex 响应

ast.name: log
ast.source: Simple tex data
ast.target: Simple tex 数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL for the API endpoint, only active when self-hosted is enabled.
ast.target: API 端点的 URL，仅在启用自托管时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your username for authentication. If you use self-hosted and a basic auth proxy before the container.
ast.target: 用于认证的用户名。如果你使用自托管并在容器前使用基本认证代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your password for authentication. If you use self-hosted and a basic auth proxy before the container.
ast.target: 用于认证的密码。如果你使用自托管并在容器前使用基本认证代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which provider to use for OCR and Latex conversion
ast.target: 选择用于 OCR 和 LaTeX 转换的提供商

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your SimpleTexToken, see README.md for more info.
ast.target: 你的 SimpleTexToken，更多信息请参阅 README.md。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Username (self-hosted optional)
ast.target: 用户名（自托管可选）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Password (self-hosted optional)
ast.target: 密码（自托管可选）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Latex provider
ast.target: LaTeX 提供商

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter your URL
ast.target: 输入你的 URL

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter your username
ast.target: 输入你的用户名

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter your password
ast.target: 输入你的密码

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter token...
ast.target: 输入令牌…

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate multiline LaTeX from last image to clipboard
ast.target: 从上一张图像生成多行 LaTeX 到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate inline LaTeX from last image to clipboard
ast.target: 从上一张图片生成内联 LaTeX 到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate markdown from last image to clipboard using Texify
ast.target: 使用 Texify 从上一张图片生成 Markdown 到剪贴板

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please see the README.md for info on how to configure the extension
ast.target: 有关如何配置扩展的信息，请查看 README.md
